creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #11)
As far as I can see the original sample configuration file was included by the port maintainer as a patch-file (patch-fluent.conf.sample) that is in fact a diff to a zero-length fluent.conf.sample file.

Since the sample configuration file could be auto-generated by the fluentd itself using "-s" command-line option, I've created a new sample configuration file using fluentd 1.11.2 and prepared a patch for the patch-fluent.conf.sample file.
